title: Mondoro Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting Mondoro with a Z-Score of +6.54. Temperatures are extremely high, reaching a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Mondoro is causing severe conditions, with very low humidity at 21% and moderate winds at 11.2 km/h.
The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) are significantly high at 21.9 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling systems.
The heat wave is expected to persist, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) recorded, emphasizing the need for cooling measures.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
